properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Lord I want to take the time, Just to praise Your Holy Name, 'Cause You've been, been so good to me; So from the rising of the sun, To the going down of the same, Lord Your Name alone is worthy to be praised.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are the great I AM that I AM, The God that was, is, and is to come, Prophet, Priest and King, Eagle, Lamb and Lion, Son of Man, Son of God and Son of David.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are the Rose of Sharon, You're the Lily of the valley, You're the Bright and Morning Star, That's who You are; The Mighty Conqueror that's been unconquered by traditions, The Lord God Jehovah is His name.
